programme.title: Movie

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: After thirteen years of weekend warrior renovations, a couple get so impatient with their lack of progress that they demolish almost every room in their house; Jasmine has seven weeks to tackle their upstairs bedrooms and main bathroom.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: A couple bought a fixer-upper in their dream neighborhood with hopes of making it their forever home, but DIY attempts have been disastrous; Jasmine has nine weeks to transform their kitchen, living room and playroom into a light and beachy space.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: Two newlyweds from Chicago love the house they bought in Arkansas, but they want to put their own personalized stamp on it; Jenny and Dave use the couple's Napa wedding as inspiration to turn the drab brick rancher into a dazzling first home.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: A couple with Australian roots wants to brighten up their dull '80s rancher and make it better reflect their family's lifestyle; Dave and Jenny give all the kids a special space of their own and update the home with some Aussie inspired touches.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: The Marrs team up with volunteers to remodel a home for a family who have faced difficult health battles; with only 24 hours at hand, they struggle against the clock as well as the challenging weather to give the family the support they deserve.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny take on a big project when they receive the task of revitalizing a 24-room lakeside motel in just 90 days.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous

programme.title: Castle Impossible

programme.title: Castle Impossible
programme.desc: After a surprise request from Daphne's grandmother to move back to the castle, Daphne and Ian face their biggest challenge yet as they renovate one of the most derelict buildings on the property: the château gatehouse.
